parameters.prompt: One isolated shallow rectangular spacecraft interior wall panel, exactly 2.4 m wide, 2.5 m high and only 0.28 m deep. Solid flat rear mounting plane; front has structural edge rails, removable pressure-liner panels, flush equipment doors, one recessed utility chase, two handholds, task-light recesses, seals and fasteners. Bas-relief wall slab only, depth less than 12 percent of width, visible face +Z. No doorway, room, floor, ceiling, side chamber, furniture, loose cable, text, logo, stand, ground or background.
parameters.texture_prompt: De-lit spacecraft interior panel: warm gray painted alloy, dark graphite rails and seals, brushed titanium fasteners, restrained amber maintenance latches and subtle edge wear. No baked lighting, pseudo-text, logos, broad dirt, labels or emissive glow.

reasons: generated a deep equipment crate instead of a 0.28 m shallow wall slab
minimum-to-maximum dimension ratio is 0.522 rather than at most 0.12
three connected components and full side/top skins prevent direct modular wall use
art_review.disposition: retain as a negative-control shape study; do not refine or promote
